countries.name: India
stereotypes: speak English with a strong accent
less strict about hygiene in some regions
not trustworthy and prone to scams
countries.notes: These impressions come from tech industry exposure and media representation.

countries.name: Pakistan
stereotypes: not trustworthy and prone to scams
countries.notes: These impressions often come from sports coverage and limited international news exposure.

countries.name: Bangladesh
stereotypes: not trustworthy and prone to scams
countries.notes: These impressions are shaped by labor and manufacturing narratives in regional media.

countries.name: Sri Lanka
countries.notes: These impressions are influenced by travel media and cultural proximity through Buddhism.

countries.name: Nepal
countries.notes: These impressions are strongly connected to mountain culture and trekking imagery.

countries.name: Bhutan
stereotypes: Japanese royal family and Bhutanese King friendship
countries.notes: These impressions often come from international reporting on Gross National Happiness.

countries.name: Maldives
countries.notes: These impressions are shaped mostly by honeymoon and travel promotion content.
